programme.title: Give Me Shelter - Film
programme.desc: Celebrities are on a mission to save animals caught in the crosshairs of human arrogance and greed.

programme.title: A Prayer For Compassion
programme.desc: An inspirational documentary about the importance of expanding your circle of compassion in life.

programme.title: The Human Experiment
programme.desc: A riveting documentary about chemicals being poured into our lives in various ways.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep109: Toxic Invaders
programme.desc: They’re beautiful - and deadly, with venomous spines that resemble a lion's mane. They’re lionfish, a tropical reef species normally found in the Indo-Pacific. Now, they’re wreaking havoc in the Caribbean and Atlantic – all thought to have descended from a handful of aquarium fish carelessly released into the sea. In these regions, they're potentially a greater threat to coral reefs and commercial fish populations than global warming or pollution.

programme.title: World of Watersports Ep308: Wingfoil World Tour in Spain + Women Cliff Divers + Sailing Regatta
programme.desc: World of Watersports showcases the GWA Wingfoil World Tour in Spain, highlights the world's best female Cliff Divers, and heads to South East Asia for the prestigious Royal Langkawi Sailing Regatta.

programme.title: Travel Quest Ep102: Antarctica
programme.desc: Violent oceans, giant icebergs and incredible scenery are all in a day’s work in the Southern Continent. Host Bill Ball shadows penguin researchers as they take population counts of one of the most fascinating birds on earth.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep104: Miracle Venom
programme.desc: Miracle Venom explores the strange, and often bizarre world of the oceans most venomous animals. Follow Dr. Glen Burns as he handles deadly Sea Snakes with only his bare hands. You'll be amazed at how a small Cone Snail hunts, paralyses and then eats it's prey alive.

programme.title: Water Ways TV Ep204: St. John’s Newfoundland, Canada
programme.desc: Host Steven Bull explores St. John’s, Newfoundland from whale watching to North America’s oldest sporting event...The Royal St. John's Regatta…since 1818.

programme.title: Hot Water Ep123: F1H2O Powerboat World Championship Tour from Xiamen, China
programme.desc: The UIM F1H2O Powerboat World Championship Tour heads to a new location, Xiamen, China, for Round 4 with the Grand Prix of Xiamen.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep111: Shark Nation
programme.desc: There's no doubt sharks have an image problem. And they're certainly in trouble globally. The population of some species has declined by more than 90% due to over fishing. But there's still one place in the world where sharks thrive – the Bahamas. Sharks not only prosper there, they are highly protected. It’s illegal to kill them.

programme.title: Let's Take It Outside Ep106: Shark Mania…Misty dives with the Monster Hammerheads of Bimini – Bahamas
programme.desc: An action packed episode as Misty swims in open water with Bimini’s famous 16-foot Hammerhead Sharks…no cage needed. Misty then takes on the Black Tip Reef sharks on Triangle Rock and searches the sunken Sapona for wildlife treasure.

programme.title: Arc’teryx Presents: On The Verge
programme.desc: In the mountains behind the coastal town of Powell River, BC, rock climbers have spent decades quietly pioneering routes on some of the largest granite walls in Canada. As the landscape comes under threat of logging, the climbing community faces an uncertain future. Lives! Logs! Legacies!

programme.title: 12 Dogs Drive
programme.desc: Facing incredible physical and emotional challenges, a musher and his dog sled team travel from Churchill Manitoba, three thousand kilometres through the wilderness to their new home in Saint John, New Brunswick Canada.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Vivid
programme.desc: Absinthe Films’ Vivid highlights the breakout years of Travis Rice, Romain De Marchi, Nicolas Müller, and Gigi Rüf, delivering some of their most memorable early riding in a fan-favorite classic.

programme.title: Artist Profile - Scott Lenhardt
programme.desc: Artist Scott Lenhardt has kept everything he’s ever made for Burton Snowboards. Everything he’s ever done is stored in his childhood bedroom. After his year-long solo show at the Vermont Ski Snowboard Museum, he organized his archives. Just like his creative process, this film is mind blowing.

programme.title: Artist Profile - Sebo Walker
programme.desc: In 2022, the art-inspired accessories brand Slowtide launched a summer collection with Portland, Oregon-based artist and skateboarder Sebo Walker. To capture the collaboration, director Jake Price spent a day cruising around Walker’s hometown, seeing the city and learning what inspires his artwork.

programme.title: Without a Paddle
programme.desc: ‘Without a Paddle’ is a canoe film about snowboarding. Four snowboarders retrace a portion of the 19th century explorer David Thompson’s journey down the Columbia River, during one of the coldest cold snaps in Revelstoke’s recorded history. Surreal landscapes, epic paddling, deep powder, and pain.

programme.title: Without a Pedal
programme.desc: Snowboarding Alaska the hard way. An epic winter bike trip down Canada’s Cassiar Highway turns into a test of survival, obsession, and how far you’ll go for the dream.

programme.title: Northbound and Around
programme.desc: Hungry for clips and greedy for turns, Johan Rosen, Garrett “Worm” Warnick and friends spent the season leaving no line unridden and no pillow unsmashed. Driven by the most unsatisfiable of desires, finding good snow, the crew spent the season running from warm temperatures and chasing down a dream. To get to the promised land, they found themselves traveling… Northbound and Around. Featuring: Garrett Warnick, Johan Rosen, Nils Arvidsson, Ryan Paterson, Keenan Filmer, Kareem El Rafie Nils Mindnich, Jess Kimura, Bode Merrill, Ben Bilocq, Brandon Davis, Nick Khattar, Kyle Mack Edited by: Johan Rosen

programme.title: CHANNEL ZeRO
programme.desc: Released in 2020, this Absinthe Films feature highlights the unifying power of snowboarding during a divisive moment in history, celebrating a global community that refuses to be separated by physical or mental barriers.

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 1
programme.desc: The GC32 Racing Tour is back! The World Sailing foiling catamaran circuit has returned as the world recovers from COVID, and both teams and organizers have been keen to return to racing onboard their state-of-the-art flying catamarans. After 18 months of no racing and cancelled events, the anticipation going into the first event in Lagos, Portugal is huge!After a highly competitive, spectacular 2019 season the GC32 foiling cats are back on the racecourse. In 2021, the ultra-high performance one-design catamarans will visit 3 top venues for 4 events, each location selected specially to provide conditions ideal for the nimble GC32s to fly across the water at 30+ knot speeds.So, let’s travel to Lagos, in southern Portugal's Algarve region to witness the first GC32 Racing Tour event for 2021, Lagos Cup 1.

programme.title: Nastro Rosa Tour - Review
programme.desc: A sports format, innovative and spectacular. An international tour along the mediterranean coasts and lighthouses of the Mediterranean sea.A series of multi-disciplinary sailing events, in an exclusive Italian concept consisting of stages that will touch some of the most beautiful Italian and Mediterranean coastal resorts.

programme.title: The Kayak Man
programme.desc: Another expedition? You must be crazy.This is what Beppe's friend told him when he decided to leave for North America. Even after paddling in the biggest rivers in the world, his desire for adventure was still not satisfied, and he went out looking for more. Dreaming of freedom, sleeping bags and nature, he ventured into the unknown to discover the Yukon and Teslin Rivers.For those unaware, the Yukon river is the major watercourse of the northwest of North America. It flows through the Canadian Yukon Territory and makes it's way to Alaska. The Teslin River is a bit shorter, but not for this reason less fun to dive into. They both offer an impressive scenery amidst cold temperatures, dangerous whitewaters and the wild nature of North America.The Kayak Man takes us on a journey of self discovery through the most beautiful landscapes of Canada and the United States while following the path of a brave kayaker that leaves his life behind in an attempt to explore new horizons by himself. An impressive trip that will not leave him the same way he was before.

programme.title: La Transat AG2R La Mondiale - Episode 1 - Depart
programme.desc: Every two years, the city of Concarneau in southern Finistère hosts the start of the Transat AG2R La Mondiale: the double-handed transatlantic on identical boats, founded over 25 years ago. This time, 15 boats line up on the quay of Carnot to make legend in this incredible competition. Let's dive into the action in France!

programme.title: Vaulting Season Review - Review

programme.title: Caesar
programme.desc: A black white, film noir fashioned as a 40's gangster movie adaption from the classic Shakespearean stage-play 'Julius Caesar'.

programme.title: City of Vultures 2
programme.desc: A gangster makes moves to take over the Southside of Chicago, but the police are closing in as street violence escalates to devastating levels.

programme.title: City of Vultures 3
programme.desc: Richard joins in the drug trade, as advocates for reform urge him to change. G attempts to raise his son on Chicago's violent south side.

programme.title: A Gun for Jennifer
programme.desc: A woman comes to New York City from Ohio to escape an abusive husband and gets entangled with murderous female vigilantes who prey on abusive men.

programme.title: Reel Nightmare: Book of Nightmare
programme.desc: Three beautiful, vengeful witches awakened by an ancient book, the Necronomicon, bring production of a film in their old family home to a deadly halt.

programme.title: Sadomaster
programme.desc: Extreme urban violence reigns in Argentina. Senator Beccar Varela rises as the only way to stop violence with his "zero tolerance" politic. People doesn't suspect that Beccar is the head of the nazi gang that causes the violence. When members of the gang torture and rape a retarded man, a mysterious Masked avenger begins his brutal revenge against the gangs and the corrupt politics.

programme.title: Domestic Hell
programme.desc: Jack and Julia are a couple with dark secrets. Blanca is a tortured soul with a past. And Olivia is hellbent on finding the truth. When these four lives intersect, nobody escapes. Bonds are tested; wills are broken; and, metal is forged. It's a tale of survival, trust, and darkness from the creators of Bloody Drama.

programme.title: Satan Claus
programme.desc: With the clock ticking and the body count rising, Homicide Detective Timothy Reynolds reluctantly volunteers to assist his former partner, Detective Alan Fryer, with the investigation to a slew of grisly murders left behind by a mission orientated killer during the Christmas holidays.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue - S01:E07 - Swoop and Scoop
programme.desc: Wiedie and Chris designed their lives so they can experience all Jackson Hole has to offer. And when a young snowmobiler's first ride into the backcountry spins out of control, they join forces with Jess and Flip to execute a perfect 'swoop and scoop' rescue.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue - S01:E08 - No Short Cuts
programme.desc: Tim demands a lot of everyone around him, especially during a cave rescue, which he describes as the worst kind of rescue.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E18 - The Queen Mother An Affectionate Tribute
programme.desc: The Queen Mother, who lived as long as the century itself, was a beloved figure in British life. She was a symbol of bravery during the Second World War and a timeless icon of steadiness, winning a deep affection from people that was only matched by the Queen herself.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E12 - The New Royals
programme.desc: Princesses Beatrice and Eugenie have gone through a lot of media attention and tough situations in their lives. From their parents' very public split to being targeted by the press, they've been through quite a bit. Despite all this, they remain dedicated to supporting the monarchy with their charity work. Through serving the Commonwealth, both sisters continue to make a positive impact.

programme.title: Diana: In Search of Happiness
programme.desc: Experience an in-depth look at Princess Diana, the extraordinary woman of the 20th century. Featuring unique interviews and touching clips, this portrait captures her incredible journey to fame and her ability to overcome the emotional and physical challenges she encountered nearly every day.

programme.title: Survive the Wild - S01:E01 - Rules of the Realm
programme.desc: Animals or groups protect their territory by using sounds like birds singing or scents like pheromones from many mammals to mark boundaries. These are just the initial warnings. If other animals ignore these signs, a conflict might happen. Animals need a secure territory to mate, raise their young, and ensure there's enough food and resources for survival. This episode looks at the strategies animals use to claim their territory.

programme.title: Wardens - S06:E17 - Bad Decisions
programme.desc: Ethical hunters make the right decisions every day. This week, Wardens find themselves confronted with bad decisions.

programme.title: MansFeld
programme.desc: A magical film about the mysteries of childhood and an old custom: In the village of MANSFELD, the ritual banishment of the old takes place every year
Marc is a surfer and lives his life one day at a time. But after many strokes of fate, he dreams of turning back time, and starting all over again.

programme.title: In Your Arms
programme.desc: The poetic tale of a man with a neurological disorder and the enigmatic nurse persuaded to support him with assisted suicide.

programme.title: 1st Bite
programme.desc: Set on a tropical island in Thailand, the strange plight of a beleaguered chef who, while romancing a mysterious woman, discovers the diabolical Zen of cooking. Following a near death escape, he returns to Montreal and falls hard for the woman of his life who unfortunately craves only his cooking but not his loving. Worse still, strange things surfacing around him indicate that his journey to the Far East has deep, divine implications. The stage is set for him to take the 1st bite of true love and end the cycle of suffering for all involved.

programme.title: Suddenly

programme.title: A Star is born
programme.desc: A film star helps a young singer and actress find fame, even as age and alcoholism send his own career on a downward spiral

programme.title: Don't Forget Where You Come From
programme.desc: Feeling like you don’t have enough? God has given you an inheritance, so don’t let pressure shrink your perspective or make you forget who you are. The God who brought you this far is more than capable of driving out what’s in your way.

programme.title: It's Worth The Dirt
programme.desc: Wondering if you should give up because progress feels slow? Wisdom isn’t choosing what’s easiest, it’s choosing what’s worth it. If you’re tempted to quit because it’s hard, remember: God uses pressure and patience to prepare you for something greater.

programme.title: Not Something, But Someone
programme.desc: Pastor Steven shares a simple truth that can help you endure life’s hardest trials. True security isn't the absence of trouble; it’s the presence of a Savior who promises you’ll never walk through it alone.

programme.title: God I'm Just Grateful
programme.desc: The official live video for "God I'm Just Grateful" by Elevation Worship and Chandler Moore.

programme.title: Faith to Stay
programme.desc: When we’re going through a season that’s uncomfortable or uncertain, we often look for a way out. But Jesus demonstrates another way that leads to lasting transformation and fulfillment if we have the faith to follow His example.

programme.title: Stop Staring At That Stone
programme.desc: Have you ever noticed how two people can be looking at the same thing and have completely different perspectives on it? One might see a problem while the other sees a reason to praise. There might be something in your life that looks like a problem right now, but God is inviting you to pivot so you can see the truth.

programme.title: It Still Works
programme.desc: Pastor Steven showed us through the life of Moses how faith often looks like taking action even while you feel full of doubt. God can do miracles when we have the courage to look our doubt in the face and do it anyway.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: Adriana manages to take Tatianita away while Carlos Raul is left confronting the criminals to defend his mother.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: Carlos Raul is surprised when Ninoska appears before him with a child he claims to be his son.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Celso, unhinged, watches and mocks Fausto, who shoots at his lover's chest, who falls instantly. Fausto goes to his office, telling everyone that nothing happened. Camila, at the scene, tries to convince Patricia to flee because everything indicates that she is Celso's murderer.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Patricia, crying, denies having killed Celso. Fausto manipulates the children into believing that their mother is the killer and must turn herself in. Camila eloquently presents her version of events and then tells Ezequiel that he lied to make Patricia pay for a crime she didn't commit, just like they did with their mother.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila, in order to make Patricia live the same anguish that her mother must have felt, will offer her help and then expose her publicly. Camila has the recorded video of what happened with Celso and the condition for not handing it over to the police is that Fausto tells how his mother was incriminated.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Maria Lourdes appears before Judge Echeverri and turns herself in for the crime of corruption and accepting bribes from Gertrudis; she hands over a folder with documents that prove what she says to bring Mrs. Corona down with her - Gertrudis scoffs at Alberto's accusations and denies, once again, being a murderer. Alberto goes to the library, he cannot live knowing what his mother did and is unable to accept. A gunshot is heard and everything seems to indicate that Alberto committed suicide. Lorena, enraged, blames Gertrudis for what happened and the Chief corroborates the death of her son. Gertrudis falls to her knees, shattered, screaming like a wounded beast.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Alberto arrives at the park where Lorena is with Norma and Ignacio. It seems to him that it is time for forgiveness and he tells her what he did with Claudio and Gertrudis, following the advice she gave him; now he feels relieved and ready to move on. Alberto, kneeling before her, proposes to Lorena with a ring in his hands. She accepts happily. "He who forgives offense, cultivates love..." End.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: En la cena, el tema principal será Rosa Blanco. Ezequiel dice que esa mujer fue una oportunista que enamoró y se aprovechó de su hermano menor, Leoncio. Astrid ofende agregando que fue una prostituta, culpable de la guerra entre las dos familias por su relación con Augusto Aragón y también con Leoncio López.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila insiste en saber sobre su relación familiar, piensa que pueda ser prima de Max. Ezequiel quiere despejar la duda de que podría ser su sobrina, interroga a la Madre Isabel que niega saberlo y también recurre a Marcelina que se lo confirma. Camila, protege a Chantal, una niña que vende flores.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max y Camila en idílicos momentos sin importar ní el resultado del A.D.N. Continúan en la búsqueda de Rosa Blanco. Dos encomiendas entregadas por un mensajero, una para los López Méndez y otra para los Aragón, confirman la reaparición de El Doliente.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Al llegar a la casa de El Jagüey, Madre Isabel no los deja entrar, conocen a Henry y presumen que también pueda ser hijo de Rosa Blanco. Max piensa que algo grave

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: La Madre Isabel, insiste en que Rosa Blanco causará mucho daño a Camila. Poco lo que se sabe, sólo que por una llamada asegura que regresará para vengarse.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Marcelina visita a la Madre Isabel para hablarle sobre su relación con Rosa Blanco, quien fue su mejor amiga y ella la traicionó; por eso quiere impedir su regreso.

programme.title: El Cóndor En Nueva York
programme.desc: Un narcotraficante de Nueva York, llamado Damián, ha creado una nueva droga con efectos impactantes.

programme.title: Amateur
programme.desc: Martín, es un editor que trabaja en un canal de televisión cuyo dueño es el señor Battaglia.

programme.title: Catemaco: Magia y Misterio
programme.desc: Una familia normal va de vacaciones a Catemaco, Michoacan un pueblo famoso y pintoresco en Mexico. Todo marcha bien hasta que son atacados por criminales, el padre sobrevive, y con ayuda del brujo mayor del pueblo cobra venganza.

programme.title: Entre Brujas y Nahuales
programme.desc: En la ciudad de Tulancingo Hidalgo, Acatlán y San Dionicio la gente anda muy asustada, pues se rumora que están ocurriendo sucesos fuera de lo normal, tal como desaparición de niños de quienes se han encontrado cuerpos sin sangre, dicen que son las brujas, porque han visto bolas de fuego que aparecen y desaparecen, pero nadie sabe la verdad lo que esta pasando y existe mucho miedo en la población de la región.

programme.title: El Hormigón
programme.desc: El hormigón es un superhéroe que está harto de la mafia de su ciudad y decide combatirla con ayuda del Karate y la salsa.

programme.title: Abolición De La Propiedad
programme.desc: En un sótano oscuro, Norma escucha su voz y la de Everio en una vieja grabadora Ampex. Cada que él vuelve a bajar, la detiene. Han estado platicándose sus vidas, varias veces las conversaciones grabadas terminan coincidiendo con las charlas que ellos sostienen. Lo que le preocupa a Norma es que hasta ese día no conocía a Everio y lo último que escuchó fue que él la ahorcaba.

programme.title: El Deseo de Domingo
programme.desc: Narra la historia de Domingo, un adulto mayor que sufre Alzheimer y pasa sus días en un geriátrico en la ciudad de Viedma, desde donde intenta, a toda costa, viajar a la Capital, a San Isidro, a ver el gran premio de turf Carlos Pellegrini. Pero claro, no se trata de cualquier premio, sino el del año 1952. Para eso necesitará de la ayuda de Marcelo, su nieto, quien se encuentra en el dilema de conformarse con su puesto en una dependencia pública o seguir luchando por triunfar con su banda de rock. …

programme.title: Call TV
programme.desc: Lucía, una actriz en decadencia, acepta presentar un programa nocturno de preguntas tontas. Sin darse cuenta de que se ha metido en un gran lío que le hará pasar la peor noche de su vida

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: Un exadicto a la heroína intenta reconstruir su vida como baterista de jazz, pero el crimen, la manipulación y la tentación amenazan con arrastrarlo de nuevo a su oscuro pasado.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and The Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Holmes debe burlar a espías nazis y a Moriarty para salvar a un inventor de miras de bombardeo.

programme.title: The Amazing Mr. X
programme.desc: Una viuda en duelo es seducida por un espiritista que afirma poder contactar a su difunto esposo, pero nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.
